description: CJK 2-char to 3-char replacement near-threshold overblack. Must use micro tuning and forced seed audit; if still rejected, must see micro tuning report, forced seed entries, and candidate rejection table.
command: .venv/bin/python scripts/roi_image_edit_cli.py process --image tests/fixtures/regression_cases/case_e_source.png --instruction '字段文字甲乙修改为丙丁戊' --output output/regression/case_e.png --profile photo_scan
instruction: 字段文字甲乙修改为丙丁戊

expected_report_fields.comment: overblack near-threshold micro tuning should fire when core black gap is small
forced seed audit must track model suggestion conversions and rejections
rejection table must list all rendered candidates with reasons
